name: Rich Brat's Shrunken Gift
description:
FART FETISH + FOOT FETISH WARNING

Due to the hard times you've fallen on, you hear of a program where they'll wipe all of your debt in exchange for shrinking yourself for a person to own. Not like you had much choice, as it was either homelessness or this.. so you sign up, and wait for your new owner to come pick you up..

If you don't like it, don't use it. Simple 😉

Let me know if you have any requests!
creator: MikeSpqm
